HomePage.title: Welcome
HomePage.description: Get started by editing this page.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage your team members and their permissions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your application preferences and configuration.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: This information appears on your guests' personal pages
profile.bioHint: Write a short welcome message for your guests
profile.bioPlaceholder: Hi! I'm Nikos, born and raised in Elounda. I love helping guests discover the real Crete!

platforms.title: Connected platforms
platforms.subtitle: Connect your booking platforms to sync reservations automatically
platforms.directBookingDesc: Accept direct bookings from your own website or in person
platforms.directLinkHint: Share this link to accept direct bookings for free
platforms.upgradeBanner: Booking.com and Airbnb sync are available on the Pro plan.
platforms.bookingDesc: Sync reservations automatically when guests book on Booking.com
platforms.airbnbDesc: Import your Airbnb reservations via iCal calendar sync
platforms.whatsappDesc: Receive and reply to guest WhatsApp messages directly in your Xenia inbox

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose what you want to be notified about

types.newReservationDesc: When a new booking is confirmed on any platform
types.guestArrivingDesc: Morning reminder for guests checking in today
types.guestMessageDesc: When a guest sends you a message through Xenia
types.issueReportedDesc: When a guest reports a problem at your property
types.checkoutReminderDesc: Evening reminder for guests checking out tomorrow
types.aiCantAnswerDesc: When the AI was unable to answer a guest's question
types.reviewReceivedDesc: When a guest leaves a review

billing.title: Subscription & Billing
billing.betaNotice: You're on the free beta plan. All features are free while we build together. Billing will be introduced soon.

plans.comingSoon: Billing coming soon — you're on the free beta plan!

invoices.title: Billing history
invoices.empty: No invoices yet — you're on the free beta plan

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Track and manage your organization's expenses.

properties.title: Properties
properties.name: Property name
properties.houseRulesPlaceholder: e.g. No smoking, quiet hours after 22:00...
properties.localTipsHint: Tell guests about your favourite local spots — best beach, best taverna, hidden gems, things to avoid. The more detail you give, the better the AI can help your guests.
properties.localTipsPlaceholder: e.g. Best beach is Elafonisi, 20 min drive. For dinner try Taverna Giorgos on the harbour...
properties.addFirst: Add your first property to get started
properties.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this property? All reservations will also be deleted.

locations.title: Properties
locations.noLocationsHint: Add your first location or standalone property to get started

amenities.title: Shared amenities
amenities.subtitle: These apply to all apartments in this location
amenities.name: Name

rules.title: Rules & access
rules.buildingAccessPlaceholder: e.g. Main entrance on the left side of the building
rules.rulePlaceholder: e.g. No smoking anywhere on the premises

contacts.title: Important contacts
contacts.subtitle: These appear on your guests' pages and the AI uses them to help guests
contacts.name: Name

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.description: Manage guest reservations across your properties.
reservations.addFirst: Add your first reservation to get started

qr.title: QR Code
qr.instructions: Print this and place it in your apartment. Guests scan it to access their personal guide.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noReservationsHint: Add your first reservation to see it on the calendar

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.comingSoon: Guest messaging is coming in Phase 2.
inbox.comingSoonHint: You'll be able to receive and reply to all guest messages from Booking.com, Airbnb, and WhatsApp in one place.

guestsCrm.title: Guests
guestsCrm.comingSoon: Your guest CRM is coming in Phase 2.
guestsCrm.comingSoonHint: Every guest who has ever stayed with you will appear here — with their full stay history, preferences, and notes.
